mapper.select: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectOrderNo */ SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS ORDER_NO
/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectServiceOrderNo */ SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_so_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS ORDER_NO
/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectPreOrderNo */ SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_preorders')::TEXT, 8, '0') AS ORDER_NO
/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInterfaceId */ SELECT nextval('seq_interface_log') AS INTERFACE_ID
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIbInterfaceToCoHd */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_HD ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , ORDERTYPECD , DLVYEXPCTDAY , ORDERISTDAY , WKSTATUS , FROMTOCTKEY , CTKEY , SHMISTNO , CLAIMNO , ORGORDERKEY , RIRSNCD , CMT , RECALLER , RECALLERADDRHD , RECALLERADDRDT , RECALLERZIPCD , RECALLERTEL01 , RECALLERTEL02 , RECALLERIYN , ORDERERRCD , ORDERERRCMT , IFID , REQORDERNO , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS COHDKEY , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD AS EXTORDERTYPECD , OT.ORDERTYPECD AS ORDERTYPECD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN #{dlvyexpctday} ELSE MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY END AS DLVYEXPCTDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN #{orderistday} ELSE MT.ORDERISTDAY END AS ORDERISTDAY , #{successWkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.FROMTOCTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.FROMTOCTKEY ELSE MT.FROMTOCTKEY END AS FROMTOCTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CTKEY ELSE MT.CTKEY END AS CTKEY , HD.SHMISTNO , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CLAIMNO = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CLAIMNO ELSE MT.CLAIMNO END AS CLAIMNO , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORGORDERKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ORGORDERKEY ELSE MT.ORGORDERKEY END AS ORGORDERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RIRSNCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RIRSNCD ELSE MT.RIRSNCD END AS RIRSNCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CMT = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CMT ELSE MT.CMT END AS CMT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLER = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLER ELSE MT.RECALLER END AS RECALLER , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERADDRHD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERADDRHD ELSE MT.RECALLERADDRHD END AS RECALLERADDRHD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERADDRDT = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERADDRDT ELSE MT.RECALLERADDRDT END AS RECALLERADDRDT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERZIPCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERZIPCD ELSE MT.RECALLERZIPCD END AS RECALLERZIPCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERTEL01 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERTEL01 ELSE MT.RECALLERTEL01 END AS RECALLERTEL01 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERTEL02 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERTEL02 ELSE MT.RECALLERTEL02 END AS RECALLERTEL02 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECALLERIYN = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECALLERIYN ELSE MT.RECALLERIYN END AS RECALLERIYN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCD = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCD END AS ORDERERRCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCMT = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCMT END AS ORDERERRCMT , #{interfaceId} AS IFID , HD.REQORDERNO , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_IBORDER_HD HD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OM.EXTORDERTYPECD , MAX(OM.ORDERTYPECD) AS ORDERTYPECD FROM TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM WHERE OM.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OM.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY OM.EXTORDERTYPECD HAVING COUNT(1)=1 ) OT ON HD.EXTORDERTYPECD = OT.EXTORDERTYPECD LEFT JOIN ( ${selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_IBORDER_HD IH WHERE IH.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND IH.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON HD.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE HD.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIbInterfaceToCoDt */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , COHDKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CODTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , REQORDERNO /*발주요청번호*/ , SHMISTNO /*출하지시번호*/ , EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OLNICKEY , ORDERISTDAY /*지시일자*/ , DLVYEXPCTDAY /*배송예정일자*/ , ORDERISTQTY /*지시수량*/ , INITQTY /*초기수량*/ , UNIT /*지시단위*/ , ORDERERRCD /*주문오류 코드*/ , ORDERERRCMT /*주문생성 오류비고*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.COHDKEY /*고객주문번호*/
, CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CODTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DT.REQORDERNO ORDER BY DT.ICKEY DESC) || '00' ELSE MT.CODTKEY END AS CODTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , HD.REQORDERNO , DT.SHMISTNO , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , HD.WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ICKEY = #{nullKey} THEN DT.ICKEY ELSE MT.ICKEY END AS ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OLNICKEY = #{nullKey} THEN DT.OLNICKEY ELSE MT.OLNICKEY END AS OLNICKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ORDERISTDAY ELSE MT.ORDERISTDAY END AS ORDERISTDAY /*지시일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.DLVYEXPCTDAY ELSE MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY END AS DLVYEXPCTDAY /*배송예정일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTQTY = #{nullKey} THEN DT.ORDERISTQTY ELSE MT.ORDERISTQTY END AS ORDERISTQTY /*지시수량*/ , CASE WHEN HD.EXTORDERTYPECD = 'DA01' THEN COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(X.CNFRMREQORDERQTY, 0) FROM TORDER_INFO_REQORDER X WHERE X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.REQORDERNO = HD.REQORDERNO AND X.ICKEY = DT.ICKEY), 0) ELSE CAST(DT.ORDERISTQTY AS NUMERIC) END INITQTY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.UNIT = #{nullKey} THEN IC.UOM ELSE MT.UNIT END AS UNIT /*지시단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCD = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCD END AS ORDERERRCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCMT = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCMT END AS ORDERERRCMT , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_IBORDER_DT DT JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD HD ON (DT.REQORDERNO = HD.REQORDERNO OR DT.CLAIMNO = DT.CLAIMNO) AND HD.WKSTATUS <> #{cancelWkstatus} AND HD.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON HD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICKEY AND IU.ICUNITTYPE = #{icuttype} LEFT JOIN ( ${selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_IBORDER_DT WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON DT.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE DT.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND DT.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIbInterfaceToImg */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_IMG ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , IMGURL , ORGORDERKEY , CLAIMNO , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , CH.COHDKEY , INTF.IMGURL , INTF.ORGORDERKEY , INTF.CLAIMNO , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_FILE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND INTF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{interfaceId}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertObInterfaceToCoHd */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_HD ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , ORDERTYPECD , ORGORDERKEY , CLAIMNO , DLVYMETHDCD , DLVYMETHDDTCD , CTKEY , MALORDERDIV , NISCNLRNGDIV , DLVYEXPCTDAY , ORDERISTDAY , PAYMTCOMPLDAY , BUYER , BUYERTEL01 , BUYERTEL02 , BUYERZIPCD , BUYERADDRHD , BUYERADDRDT , RECPNM , RECPTEL01 , RECPTEL02 , RECPZIPCD , RECPADDRHD , RECPADDRDT , CMT , PARTERID , ACCESSKEY , ADDCMT01 , ADDCMT02 , ADDCMT03 , WKSTATUS , ORDERERRCD , ORDERERRCMT , IFID , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS COHDKEY , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD AS EXTORDERTYPECD , OT.ORDERTYPECD AS ORDERTYPECD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORGORDERKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ORGORDERKEY ELSE MT.ORGORDERKEY END AS ORGORDERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CLAIMNO = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CLAIMNO ELSE MT.CLAIMNO END AS CLAIMNO , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYMETHDCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.DLVYMETHDCD ELSE MT.DLVYMETHDCD END AS DLVYMETHDCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYMETHDDTCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.DLVYMETHDDTCD ELSE MT.DLVYMETHDDTCD END AS DLVYMETHDDTCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CTKEY ELSE MT.CTKEY END AS CTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.MALORDERDIV = #{nullKey} THEN HD.MALORDERDIV ELSE MT.MALORDERDIV END AS MALORDERDIV , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.NISCNLRNGDIV = #{nullKey} THEN HD.NISCNLRNGDIV ELSE MT.NISCNLRNGDIV END AS NISCNLRNGDIV , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.DLVYEXPCTDAY ELSE MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY END AS DLVYEXPCTDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ORDERISTDAY ELSE MT.ORDERISTDAY END AS ORDERISTDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PAYMTCOMPLDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.PAYMTCOMPLDAY ELSE MT.PAYMTCOMPLDAY END AS PAYMTCOMPLDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYER = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYER ELSE MT.BUYER END AS BUYER , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYERTEL01 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYERTEL01 ELSE MT.BUYERTEL01 END AS BUYERTEL01 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYERTEL02 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYERTEL02 ELSE MT.BUYERTEL02 END AS BUYERTEL02 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYERZIPCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYERZIPCD ELSE MT.BUYERZIPCD END AS BUYERZIPCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYERADDRHD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYERADDRHD ELSE MT.BUYERADDRHD END AS BUYERADDRHD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BUYERADDRDT = #{nullKey} THEN HD.BUYERADDRDT ELSE MT.BUYERADDRDT END AS BUYERADDRDT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPNM = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPNM ELSE MT.RECPNM END AS RECPNM , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPTEL01 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPTEL01 ELSE MT.RECPTEL01 END AS RECPTEL01 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPTEL02 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPTEL02 ELSE MT.RECPTEL02 END AS RECPTEL02 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPZIPCD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPZIPCD ELSE MT.RECPZIPCD END AS RECPZIPCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPADDRHD = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPADDRHD ELSE MT.RECPADDRHD END AS RECPADDRHD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.RECPADDRDT = #{nullKey} THEN HD.RECPADDRDT ELSE MT.RECPADDRDT END AS RECPADDRDT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CMT = #{nullKey} THEN HD.CMT ELSE MT.CMT END AS CMT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PARTERID = #{nullKey} THEN HD.PARTERID ELSE MT.PARTERID END AS PARTERID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ACCESSKEY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ACCESSKEY ELSE MT.ACCESSKEY END AS ACCESSKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ADDCMT01 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ADDCMT01 ELSE MT.ADDCMT01 END AS ADDCMT01 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ADDCMT02 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ADDCMT02 ELSE MT.ADDCMT02 END AS ADDCMT02 , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ADDCMT03 = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ADDCMT03 ELSE MT.ADDCMT03 END AS ADDCMT03 , #{successWkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCD = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCD END AS ORDERERRCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCMT = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCMT END AS ORDERERRCMT , #{interfaceId} AS IFID , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_OBORDER_HD HD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OM.EXTORDERTYPECD , MAX(OM.ORDERTYPECD) AS ORDERTYPECD FROM TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM WHERE OM.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OM.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY OM.EXTORDERTYPECD HAVING COUNT(1)=1 ) OT ON HD.EXTORDERTYPECD = OT.EXTORDERTYPECD LEFT JOIN ( ${selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_OBORDER_HD WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON HD.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE HD.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertObInterfaceToCoDt */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , CODTKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , ORGORDERKEY , ICKEY , OLNICKEY , ORDERISTDAY , DLVYEXPCTDAY , ORDERISTQTY , UNIT , MALBOXQTY , MALPCSQTY , WKSTATUS , ORDERERRCD , ORDERERRCMT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.COHDKEY /*고객주문번호*/
, CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CODTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OD.ORGORDERKEY ORDER BY OD.ICKEY DESC) || '00' ELSE MT.CODTKEY END AS CODTKEY , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORGORDERKEY = '-9999' THEN OD.ORGORDERKEY ELSE MT.ORGORDERKEY END AS ORGORDERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ICKEY = '-9999' THEN OD.ICKEY ELSE MT.ICKEY END AS ICKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OLNICKEY = '-9999' THEN OD.OLNICKEY ELSE MT.OLNICKEY END AS OLNICKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.ORDERISTDAY ELSE MT.ORDERISTDAY END AS ORDERISTDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY = #{nullKey} THEN HD.DLVYEXPCTDAY ELSE MT.DLVYEXPCTDAY END AS DLVYEXPCTDAY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERISTQTY = '-9999' THEN CAST(OD.ORDERISTQTY AS NUMERIC) ELSE CAST(MT.ORDERISTQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS ORDERISTQTY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.UNIT = '-9999' THEN IC.UOM ELSE MT.UNIT END AS UNIT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.MALBOXQTY = '-9999' THEN CAST(OD.MALBOXQTY AS NUMERIC) ELSE CAST(MT.MALBOXQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS MALBOXQTY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.MALPCSQTY = '-9999' THEN CAST(OD.MALPCSQTY AS NUMERIC) ELSE CAST(MT.MALPCSQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS MALPCSQTY , HD.WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCD = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCD END AS ORDERERRCD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERERRCMT = #{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDERERRCMT END AS ORDERERRCMT , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_OBORDER_DT OD JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD HD ON OD.ORGORDERKEY = HD.ORGORDERKEY AND HD.WKSTATUS <> #{cancelWkstatus} AND HD.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON HD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICKEY AND IU.ICUNITTYPE = #{icuttype} LEFT JOIN ( ${selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_OBORDER_DT WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON OD.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE OD.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND OD.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}
mapper.select: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectCoOrTypeMappList_bak */ WITH MAPPLIST AS ( SELECT M.EXTORDERTYPECD , M.ORDERTYPECD FROM TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING M JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON M.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND M.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD AND M.DELYN = OT.DELYN JOIN TORDER_MST_EXTERN ET ON M.OWKEY = ET.OWKEY AND M.EXTORDERTYPECD = ET.EXTORDERTYPECD AND M.DELYN = ET.DELYN WHERE M.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND M.DELYN = 'N' ) , MAPPDTLIST AS ( SELECT CO.COCOLUMN , CO.ORDERTYPECD , CO.REQRDYN , CO.CDRFRNCVAL , CO.HDDTDIV FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_CHK CO JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CO.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CO.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE CO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CO.HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND CO.DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT TT.OWKEY , TT.COHDKEY , TT.EXTORDERTYPECD , TT.ORDERTYPECD , TT.REAL_OR_TYPE_CD , TT.REQORDERNO FROM ( SELECT T1.OWKEY , T1.COHDKEY , T1.EXTORDERTYPECD , T1.ORDERTYPECD , T1.REAL_OR_TYPE_CD , T1.REQORDERNO FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY , T.COHDKEY , T.EXTORDERTYPECD , T.ORDERTYPECD , T.REAL_OR_TYPE_CD , T.REQORDERNO FROM ( SELECT TC.OWKEY , TC.COHDKEY , TC.EXTORDERTYPECD , TC.ORDERTYPECD , TC.ORDERTYPECD AS REAL_OR_TYPE_CD , TC.REQORDERNO FROM ( SELECT REQORDERNO , DLVYEXPCTDAY FROM TORDER_INTF_IBORDER_HD -- bak WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TI JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD TC ON TI.REQORDERNO = TC.REQORDERNO AND TC.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND TC.WKSTATUS <> #{cancelWkstatus} AND TC.OWKEY = #{owkey} ) T ) T1 ) TT WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertObInterfaceToCo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_HD ( OWKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , OR_TYPE_CD , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , WKSTATUS , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , BILLKEY , PAYERKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_NO , PO_TYPE , REFERENCETYPE , REFERENCEKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , SALESPERSON_ID , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , COMMENTS , CANCEL_YN , CANCEL_ID , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , EDI_YN , TO_CTKEY , CTKEY , LOADINGYN /*배차여부*/ , SPECIALOUTTYPE /*특이출고유형*/ , SPECIALORDERTYPE /*특이주문유형(베이커리 등 구분)*/ , MOVEMENT_TYPE /*이동유형*/ , PRIORITY_ORDER , AMOUNTDISPLAYYN , INTERFACE_ID , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , HD.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AS EXTORDERTYPECD , OT.OR_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT END AS DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OR_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.OR_HD_DT END AS OR_HD_DT , #{successWkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_KEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_KEY ELSE MT.DELIVERY_KEY END AS DELIVERY_KEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.STORE_KEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.ACKEY ELSE MT.STORE_KEY END AS STORE_KEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BILLKEY =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.BILLKEY END AS BILLKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PAYERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.PAYERKEY END AS PAYERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ACKEY=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ACKEY END AS ACKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_NO=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.DELIVERY_NO END AS DELIVERY_NO , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PO_TYPE =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCETYPE=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.REFERENCETYPE END AS REFERENCETYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.REFERENCEKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEKEY END AS REFERENCEKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.EXTERNORDERKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERKEY END AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SALESPERSON_ID =#{nullKey} THEN HD.SALESPERSON_ID ELSE MT.SALESPERSON_ID END AS SALESPERSON_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ELSE MT.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID END AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN HD.COMMENTS ELSE MT.COMMENTS END AS COMMENTS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.CANCEL_YN END AS CANCEL_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_ID =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.CANCEL_ID END AS CANCEL_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EDI_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.EDI_YN END AS EDI_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.TO_CTKEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.TO_CTKEY ELSE MT.TO_CTKEY END AS TO_CTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CTKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.CTKEY ELSE MT.CTKEY END AS CTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.LOADINGYN =#{nullKey} THEN HD.LOADINGYN ELSE MT.LOADINGYN END AS LOADINGYN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SPECIALOUTTYPE =#{nullKey} THEN HD.SPECIALOUTTYPE ELSE MT.SPECIALOUTTYPE END AS SPECIALOUTTYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SPECIALORDERTYPE =#{nullKey} THEN HD.SPECIALORDERTYPE ELSE MT.SPECIALORDERTYPE END AS SPECIALORDERTYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.MOVEMENT_TYPE =#{nullKey} THEN HD.MOVEMENT_TYPE ELSE MT.MOVEMENT_TYPE END AS MOVEMENT_TYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PRIORITY_ORDER =#{nullKey} THEN HD.PRIORITY_ORDER ELSE MT.PRIORITY_ORDER END AS PRIORITY_ORDER , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.AMOUNTDISPLAYYN =#{nullKey} THEN HD.AMOUNTDISPLAYYN ELSE MT.AMOUNTDISPLAYYN END AS AMOUNTDISPLAYYN , #{interfaceId} AS INTERFACE_ID , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD HD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , MAX(OR_TYPE_CD) AS OR_TYPE_CD FROM TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD HAVING COUNT(1)=1 ) OT ON HD.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD = OT.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN ( ${selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON HD.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE HD.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertObInterfaceToCoItem */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , CUSTOMERORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OR_HD_DT /*지시일자*/ , DELIVERY_HD_DT /*배송예정일자*/ , ORDERQTY /*지시수량*/ , UNIT /*지시단위*/ , CONVERTQTY /*환산수량(EA)*/ , SALEUNIT /*판매단위*/ , OB_COSTPRICE /*출고가*/ , INDIAMT /*지시금액*/ , VAT /*부가세*/ , EXTDT /*역순통제 예외 관리일자*/ , PRODUCT_LOT /*생산 LOT*/ , PRODUCT_DT /*생산일자*/ , TOTALWEIGHT /*총중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*총부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , LOGGRPCD /*온도*/ , IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ , COMMENTS /*비고*/ , CANCEL_YN /*주문취소여부*/ , CANCEL_ID /*주문취소ID*/ , REFERENCETYPE /*이전참조구분*/ , REFERENCEKEY /*이전참조문서번호*/ , REFERENCEDTKEY /*이전참조상세번호*/ , ORDER_ERROR_CD /*주문오류 코드*/ , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS /*주문생성 오류비고*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ELSE MT.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY END AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , HD.WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ICKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.ICKEY ELSE MT.ICKEY END AS ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OR_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN DT.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.OR_HD_DT END AS OR_HD_DT /*지시일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_HD_DT ELSE MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT END AS DELIVERY_HD_DT /*배송예정일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERQTY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.ORDERQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS ORDERQTY /*지시수량*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.UNIT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.UNIT ELSE MT.UNIT END AS UNIT /*지시단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CONVERTQTY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.CONVERTQTY ELSE CAST(MT.CONVERTQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS CONVERTQTY /*환산수량(EA)*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SALEUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.SALEUNIT ELSE MT.SALEUNIT END AS SALEUNIT /*판매단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OB_COSTPRICE =#{nullKey} THEN DT.OB_COSTPRICE ELSE CAST(MT.OB_COSTPRICE AS NUMERIC) END AS OB_COSTPRICE /*출고가*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.INDIAMT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.INDIAMT ELSE CAST(MT.INDIAMT AS NUMERIC) END AS INDIAMT /*지시금액*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VAT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.VAT ELSE CAST(MT.VAT AS NUMERIC) END AS VAT /*부가세*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTDT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTDT ELSE MT.EXTDT END AS EXTDT /*역순통제 예외 관리일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PRODUCT_LOT=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.PRODUCT_LOT END AS PRODUCT_LOT /*생산 LOT*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PRODUCT_DT =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.PRODUCT_DT END AS PRODUCT_DT /*생산일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.TOTALWEIGHT=#{nullKey} THEN COALESCE(MU.WEIGHT, IU.WEIGHT)*DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.TOTALWEIGHT AS NUMERIC)*DT.EXQTY END AS TOTALWEIGHT /*총중량*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.WEIGHTUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN IU.WEIGHTUNIT ELSE MT.WEIGHTUNIT END AS WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VOLUME =#{nullKey} THEN COALESCE(MU.VOL, IU.VOL)*DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.VOLUME AS NUMERIC)*DT.EXQTY END AS VOLUME /*총부피*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VOLUMEUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN IU.VOLUNIT ELSE MT.VOLUMEUNIT END AS VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.LOGGRPCD =#{nullKey} THEN IC.UDF2 ELSE MT.LOGGRPCD END AS LOGGRPCD /*온도*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.IC_RATE =#{nullKey} THEN DT.IC_RATE ELSE CAST(MT.IC_RATE AS NUMERIC) END AS IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BONUS_IC_RATE =#{nullKey} THEN DT.BONUS_IC_RATE ELSE CAST(MT.BONUS_IC_RATE AS NUMERIC) END AS BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERKEY END AS EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY END AS EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN DT.COMMENTS ELSE MT.COMMENTS END AS COMMENTS /*비고*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.CANCEL_YN END AS CANCEL_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_ID =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.CANCEL_ID END AS CANCEL_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCETYPE=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.REFERENCETYPE END AS REFERENCETYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEKEY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.REFERENCEKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEKEY END AS REFERENCEKEY /*이전참조문서번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEDTKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.REFERENCEDTKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEDTKEY END AS REFERENCEDTKEY /*이전참조상세번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_DT DT JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD HD ON DT.EXTERNORDERKEY = HD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND HD.WKSTATUS <> #{cancelWkstatus} AND HD.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON HD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND DT.SALEUNIT = IU.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICMEASUREMENT MU ON IC.OWKEY = MU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = MU.ICUNITKEY AND DT.SALEUNIT = MU.ICUNITTYPE AND HD.CTKEY = MU.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( #{selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_DT WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON DT.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE DT.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND DT.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIbInterfaceToCo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_HD ( OWKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , OR_TYPE_CD , DELIVERY_HD_DT , OR_HD_DT , WKSTATUS , DELIVERY_KEY , STORE_KEY , BILLKEY , PAYERKEY , ACKEY , DELIVERY_NO , PO_TYPE , REFERENCETYPE , REFERENCEKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , SALESPERSON_ID , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , COMMENTS , CANCEL_YN , CANCEL_ID , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , EDI_YN , TO_CTKEY , CTKEY , SPECIALORDERTYPE /*특이주문유형(베이커리 등 구분)*/ , INTERFACE_ID , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') || #{orderNoType} || LPAD(nextval('seq_torder_info_co_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , HD.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AS EXTORDERTYPECD , OT.OR_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT END AS DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OR_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.OR_HD_DT END AS OR_HD_DT , #{successWkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_KEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_KEY ELSE MT.DELIVERY_KEY END AS DELIVERY_KEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.STORE_KEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.STORE_KEY ELSE MT.STORE_KEY END AS STORE_KEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.BILLKEY =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.BILLKEY END AS BILLKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PAYERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.PAYERKEY END AS PAYERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ACKEY =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ACKEY END AS ACKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_NO=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_NO ELSE MT.DELIVERY_NO END AS DELIVERY_NO , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PO_TYPE =#{nullKey} THEN HD.PO_TYPE ELSE MT.PO_TYPE END AS PO_TYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCETYPE=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.REFERENCETYPE END AS REFERENCETYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.REFERENCEKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEKEY END AS REFERENCEKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.EXTERNORDERKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERKEY END AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SALESPERSON_ID =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.SALESPERSON_ID END AS SALESPERSON_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID END AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN HD.COMMENTS ELSE MT.COMMENTS END AS COMMENTS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.CANCEL_YN END AS CANCEL_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_ID =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.CANCEL_ID END AS CANCEL_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EDI_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.EDI_YN END AS EDI_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.TO_CTKEY=#{nullKey} THEN HD.TO_CTKEY ELSE MT.TO_CTKEY END AS TO_CTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CTKEY =#{nullKey} THEN HD.CTKEY ELSE MT.CTKEY END AS CTKEY , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SPECIALORDERTYPE =#{nullKey} THEN HD.SPECIALORDERTYPE ELSE MT.SPECIALORDERTYPE END AS SPECIALORDERTYPE , #{interfaceId} AS INTERFACE_ID , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD HD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , MAX(OR_TYPE_CD) AS OR_TYPE_CD FROM TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD HAVING COUNT(1)=1 ) OT ON HD.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD = OT.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN ( #{selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON HD.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE HD.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIbInterfaceToCoItem */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , CUSTOMERORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OR_HD_DT /*지시일자*/ , DELIVERY_HD_DT /*배송예정일자*/ , ORDERQTY /*지시수량*/ , UNIT /*지시단위*/ , CONVERTQTY /*환산수량(EA)*/ , SALEUNIT /*판매단위*/ , OB_COSTPRICE /*출고가*/ , INDIAMT /*지시금액*/ , VAT /*부가세*/ , EXTDT /*역순통제 예외 관리일자*/ , PRODUCT_LOT /*생산 LOT*/ , PRODUCT_DT /*생산일자*/ , TOTALWEIGHT /*총중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOLUME /*총부피*/ , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , LOGGRPCD /*온도*/ , EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ , COMMENTS /*비고*/ , CANCEL_YN /*주문취소여부*/ , CANCEL_ID /*주문취소ID*/ , REFERENCETYPE /*이전참조구분*/ , REFERENCEKEY /*이전참조문서번호*/ , REFERENCEDTKEY /*이전참조상세번호*/ , ORDER_ERROR_CD /*주문오류 코드*/ , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS /*주문생성 오류비고*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = #{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ELSE MT.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY END AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY /*고객주문상세번호*/ , HD.EXTORDERTYPECD /*화주오더유형*/ , HD.WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ICKEY = #{nullKey} THEN DT.ICKEY ELSE MT.ICKEY END AS ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OR_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.OR_HD_DT ELSE MT.OR_HD_DT END AS OR_HD_DT /*지시일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT=#{nullKey} THEN HD.DELIVERY_HD_DT ELSE MT.DELIVERY_HD_DT END AS DELIVERY_HD_DT /*배송예정일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDERQTY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.ORDERQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS ORDERQTY /*지시수량*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.UNIT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.UNIT ELSE MT.UNIT END AS UNIT /*지시단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CONVERTQTY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.CONVERTQTY ELSE CAST(MT.CONVERTQTY AS NUMERIC) END AS CONVERTQTY /*환산수량(EA)*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.SALEUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.SALEUNIT ELSE MT.SALEUNIT END AS SALEUNIT /*판매단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.OB_COSTPRICE =#{nullKey} THEN DT.OB_COSTPRICE ELSE CAST(MT.OB_COSTPRICE AS NUMERIC) END AS OB_COSTPRICE /*출고가*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.INDIAMT =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE CAST(MT.INDIAMT AS NUMERIC) END AS INDIAMT /*지시금액*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VAT =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE CAST(MT.VAT AS NUMERIC) END AS VAT /*부가세*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTDT =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.EXTDT END AS EXTDT /*역순통제 예외 관리일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PRODUCT_LOT=#{nullKey} THEN DT.PRODUCT_LOT ELSE MT.PRODUCT_LOT END AS PRODUCT_LOT /*생산 LOT*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.PRODUCT_DT =#{nullKey} THEN DT.PRODUCT_DT ELSE MT.PRODUCT_DT END AS PRODUCT_DT /*생산일자*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.TOTALWEIGHT=#{nullKey} THEN COALESCE(MU.WEIGHT, IU.WEIGHT)*DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.TOTALWEIGHT AS NUMERIC)*DT.EXQTY END AS TOTALWEIGHT /*총중량*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.WEIGHTUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN IU.WEIGHTUNIT ELSE MT.WEIGHTUNIT END AS WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VOLUME =#{nullKey} THEN COALESCE(MU.VOL, IU.VOL)*DT.EXQTY ELSE CAST(MT.VOLUME AS NUMERIC)*DT.EXQTY END AS VOLUME /*총부피*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.VOLUMEUNIT =#{nullKey} THEN IU.VOLUNIT ELSE MT.VOLUMEUNIT END AS VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.LOGGRPCD =#{nullKey} THEN IC.UDF2 ELSE MT.LOGGRPCD END AS LOGGRPCD /*온도*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERKEY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERKEY END AS EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ELSE MT.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY END AS EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN DT.COMMENTS ELSE MT.COMMENTS END AS COMMENTS /*비고*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_YN =#{nullKey} THEN 'N' ELSE MT.CANCEL_YN END AS CANCEL_YN , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.CANCEL_ID =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.CANCEL_ID END AS CANCEL_ID , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCETYPE=#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.REFERENCETYPE END AS REFERENCETYPE , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEKEY =#{nullKey} THEN DT.REFERENCEKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEKEY END AS REFERENCEKEY /*이전참조문서번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.REFERENCEDTKEY=#{nullKey} THEN DT.REFERENCEDTKEY ELSE MT.REFERENCEDTKEY END AS REFERENCEDTKEY /*이전참조상세번호*/ , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_CD END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN MT.INTERFACEKEY IS NULL OR MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS =#{nullKey} THEN NULL ELSE MT.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_DT DT JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD HD ON DT.EXTERNORDERKEY = HD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND HD.WKSTATUS <> #{cancelWkstatus} AND HD.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND HD.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON HD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND DT.SALEUNIT = IU.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICMEASUREMENT MU ON IC.OWKEY = MU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = MU.ICUNITKEY AND DT.SALEUNIT = MU.ICUNITTYPE AND HD.CTKEY = MU.CTKEY LEFT JOIN ( #{selectQuery} FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_DT WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) MT ON DT.INTERFACEKEY = MT.INTERFACEKEY WHERE DT.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND DT.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}
mapper.select: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectCoChk */ SELECT LOWER(SUBSTR(REPLACE(INITCAP(A.COCOLUMN), '_', ''),1,1))||SUBSTR(REPLACE(INITCAP(A.COCOLUMN), '_', ''),2) AS COCOLUMN , COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, A.COCOLUMN) AS COLNAME , A.ORDERTYPECD , A.HDDTDIV , A.REQRDYN , A.DEFVAL , CASE WHEN A.DEFVAL IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DEFAULT_VALUE_YN FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_CHK A LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS B ON B.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND A.COCOLUMN = B.COLUMN_NAME WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND (A.REQRDYN = 'Y' OR A.DEFVAL IS NOT NULL)
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertInCoToSoWbl */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO ( OWKEY , SOHDKEY , COHDKEY , DLVRYCORP , WBLNO , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT SH.OWKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , SH.COHDKEY , RW.DLVRYCORPCD , RW.WBLNO , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON CH.COHDKEY = SH.COHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_WBL RW ON RW.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID AND RW.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND RW.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertInCoToSoImg */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_IMG ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , CLAIMNO , IMGURL , ORGORDERKEY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT SH.OWKEY , SH.COHDKEY , SH.CLAIMNO , RF.IMGURL , SH.ORGORDERKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON CH.COHDKEY = SH.COHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_FILE RF ON RF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID AND RF.IFID = #{interfaceId} AND RF.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}
mapper.select: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInWbl */ SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , INTF.WBLNO , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_WBL INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND INTF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{interfaceId}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInImg */ SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , INTF.IMGSEQ , INTF.IMGURL , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_FILE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND INTF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{interfaceId}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectPrePerformanceCancelCheck */ SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(COHD.WKSTATUS, 'ING')='ING' AND SODT.INGCNT=0 THEN '-1' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='Y' THEN '-2' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='P' THEN '-3' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='N' AND COALESCE(COHD.SAPSENDSEQ, 0)>0 AND COHD.WKSTATUS != 'SEND' THEN '-2' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='N' AND COHD.WKSTATUS IS NOT NULL AND COHD.WKSTATUS != 'COMPLETE' THEN '-2' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='N' AND COHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL AND SOHD.WKSTATUS != '20' THEN '-2' ELSE '0' END AS CODE , CASE WHEN COALESCE(COHD.WKSTATUS, 'ING')='ING' AND SODT.INGCNT=0 THEN 'Pre-processing' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='Y' THEN 'Cannot be canceled('||COHD.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS||')' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='P' THEN 'Sending performance. Please try again' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='N' AND COALESCE(COHD.SAPSENDSEQ, 0)>0 AND COHD.WKSTATUS != 'SEND' THEN 'Unsent Orders(SAP)' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='N' AND COHD.WKSTATUS IS NOT NULL AND COHD.WKSTATUS != 'COMPLETE' THEN 'Uncomplete Orders(CO)' WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='N' AND COHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL AND SOHD.WKSTATUS != '20' THEN 'Uncomplete Orders(SO)' ELSE 'Success' END AS MESSAGE , SOHD.OWKEY , SOHD.EXTERNORDERKEY , SOHD.SO_HDKEY , SOHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CASE WHEN COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N')='Y' AND COHD.SAPTRANSFAILYN='N' AND COALESCE(COHD.SAPSENDSEQ, 0)=0 AND COHD.WKSTATUS != 'SEND' THEN 'N' /*전송전이면 SAP에 확인없이 취소 가능*/ ELSE COALESCE(OM.TRANYN, 'N') END AS TRANYN , OT.WMSPERFORMANCEYN , OT.TMSPERFORMANCEYN , OT.IBYN , OT.OBYN , CASE WHEN OT.PERFORMANCETYPE='SPLT' THEN 'RDC' || '_' || SOHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(COHD.SAPSENDSEQ, '1')::TEXT, 3, '0') ELSE 'RDC' || '_' || SOHD.EXTERNORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(COHD.SAPSENDSEQ, '1')::TEXT, 3, '0') END AS IF_SYSID FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SOHD JOIN (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN WKSTATUS!='10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) INGCNT , SO_HDKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SO_HDKEY = #{soHdkey} GROUP BY SO_HDKEY ) SODT ON SOHD.SO_HDKEY = SODT.SO_HDKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON SOHD.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND SOHD.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD COHD ON SOHD.OWKEY = COHD.OWKEY AND SOHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = COHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON COHD.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND COHD.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND COHD.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN='N' WHERE SOHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SOHD.SO_HDKEY = #{soHdkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectSapSendResultList */ SELECT CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SD.SO_HDKEY , SD.SO_DTKEY , OT.WMSPERFORMANCEYN , OT.TMSPERFORMANCEYN , T.SAPTRANSFAILYN , T.SAPFAILCOMMENTS , CD.OWKEY , CASE WHEN T.SAPTRANSFAILYN<>'Y' THEN #{sendWkstatus} ELSE CH.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.EXTERNORDERKEY = CD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND T.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = CD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CD.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON CD.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD WHERE OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='ASN'

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectSapSendResultHdList */ SELECT M.OWKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , M.SAPTRANSFAILYN , M.SAPFAILCOMMENTS , CASE WHEN M.SAPTRANSFAILYN<>'Y' AND M.DTCNT=D.DTCNT THEN #{sendWkstatus} ELSE CH.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM ( SELECT CD.OWKEY , T.EXTERNORDERKEY , MAX(T.SAPTRANSFAILYN) AS SAPTRANSFAILYN , MAX(T.SAPFAILCOMMENTS) AS SAPFAILCOMMENTS , COUNT(1) AS DTCNT FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.EXTERNORDERKEY = CD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND T.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = CD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CD.OWKEY, T.EXTERNORDERKEY ) M JOIN ( SELECT CD.OWKEY , T.EXTERNORDERKEY , COUNT(1) AS DTCNT FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY EXTERNORDERKEY UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY EXTERNORDERKEY ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.EXTERNORDERKEY = CD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CD.OWKEY, T.EXTERNORDERKEY ) D ON M.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND M.EXTERNORDERKEY = D.EXTERNORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON M.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND M.EXTERNORDERKEY = CH.EXTERNORDERKEY AND CH.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD WHERE OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='ASN'

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectSapSendSplitResultList */ SELECT CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SD.SO_HDKEY , SD.SO_DTKEY , OT.WMSPERFORMANCEYN , OT.TMSPERFORMANCEYN , T.SAPTRANSFAILYN , T.SAPFAILCOMMENTS , CD.OWKEY , CASE WHEN T.SAPTRANSFAILYN<>'Y' THEN #{sendWkstatus} ELSE CH.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} UNION ALL SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND T.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CD.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON CD.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD WHERE OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='SPLT'

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectSapSendSplitResultHdList */ SELECT M.OWKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , M.SAPTRANSFAILYN , M.SAPFAILCOMMENTS , CASE WHEN M.SAPTRANSFAILYN<>'Y' AND M.DTCNT=D.DTCNT THEN #{sendWkstatus} ELSE CH.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM ( SELECT CD.OWKEY , T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , MAX(T.SAPTRANSFAILYN) AS SAPTRANSFAILYN , MAX(T.SAPFAILCOMMENTS) AS SAPFAILCOMMENTS , COUNT(1) AS DTCNT FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} UNION ALL SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SAPTRANSFAILYN , SAPFAILCOMMENTS FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND T.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = CD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CD.OWKEY, T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) M JOIN ( SELECT CD.OWKEY , T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , COUNT(1) AS DTCNT FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY CUSTOMERORDERKEY UNION ALL SELECT CUSTOMERORDERKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_SAPRESULT WHERE REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) T JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CD ON T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND CD.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} AND CD.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY CD.OWKEY, T.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) D ON M.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = D.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON M.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND CH.WKSTATUS = #{completeWkstatus} JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD WHERE OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='SPLT'
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml - insertOutNisPrePerformance */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE ( OWKEY , CTKEY , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY , EXPCTQTY , CNFRMQTY , ICKEY , UOM , CNFRMDATE , CLOSEYN , NISYN , NISCNLRNGDIV , CMT , WORKSEQ , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT SH.OWKEY , SH.CTKEY , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY , SD.EXPCTQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY , SD.OLNICKEY , SD.UOM , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CNFRMDATE , 'N' AS CLOSEYN , #{nisyn} AS NISYN , '03' AS NISCNLRNGDIV -- , '' AS CMT , COALESCE(Z.WORKSEQ, 0) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SD.OWKEY, SD.SOHDKEY, SD.SODTKEY ORDER BY SD.SODTKEY) AS WORKSEQ , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON SH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND SH.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.OWKEY , A.SOHDKEY , A.SODTKEY , MAX(A.WORKSEQ) AS WORKSEQ FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE A WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{sohdkey} AS SOHDKEY , #{sodtkey} AS SODTKEY ) B WHERE B.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND B.SOHDKEY = A.SOHDKEY AND B.SODTKEY = A.SODTKEY ) GROUP BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY ) Z ON SD.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND SD.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND SD.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND SH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SD.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND SD.SODTKEY = #{sodtkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertInRtnIcAddCoDt */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_CO_DT ( OWKEY , COHDKEY , CODTKEY , EXTORDERTYPECD , WKSTATUS , ICKEY , OLNICKEY , ORDERISTDAY , DLVYEXPCTDAY , INITQTY , ORDERISTQTY , UNIT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT INTF.OWKEY , CH.COHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY AS CODTKEY , #{extordertypecd} AS EXTORDERTYPECD , #{cowkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , INTF.ICKEY AS ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , SH.ORDERISTDAY AS ORDERISTDAY , SH.DLVYEXPCTDAY AS DLVYEXPCTDAY , '0' AS INITQTY , '0' AS ORDERISTQTY , INTF.UOM AS UNIT , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE , 'I/F Recv.Inbound' AS INSERTURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE , 'I/F Recv.Inbound' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON SH.COHDKEY = CH.COHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTF.ICADDYN = 'Y' GROUP BY INTF.OWKEY , CH.COHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY , INTF.ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY , SH.ORDERISTDAY , SH.DLVYEXPCTDAY , INTF.UOM

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertInRtnIcAddSoDt */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_SO_DT ( OWKEY , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY , ICKEY , OLNICKEY , ICUTKEY , UOM , INITQTY , EXPCTQTY , CNFRMQTY , SNDQTY , DLVYEXPCTDAY , ORDERISTDAY , OBAMT , WKSTATUS , CNFRMYN , CNLYN , COHDKEY , CODTKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRTYPE , NISQTY , NISCFMYN , URGENCYREQYN , INSPECABNORYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT INTF.OWKEY , INTF.SOHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY , INTF.ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , IC.ICUNITKEY AS ICUTKEY , IC.UOM , '0' AS INITQTY , '0' AS EXPCTQTY , SUM(INTF.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY , '0' AS SNDQTY , SH.DLVYEXPCTDAY , SH.ORDERISTDAY , '0' AS OBAMT , #{sowkstatus} AS WKSTATUS , 'N' AS CNFRMYN , 'N' AS CNLYN , SH.COHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY AS CODTKEY , IC.ICGRPKEY AS ICGRKEY , IC.ICGRPTYPE AS ICGRTYPE , '0' AS NISQTY , 'N' AS NISCFMYN , 'N' AS URGENCYREQYN , 'N' AS INSPECABNORYN , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE , 'I/F RECV.INBOUND' AS INSERTURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE , 'I/F RECV.INBOUND' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON INTF.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND INTF.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTF.ICADDYN = 'Y' GROUP BY INTF.OWKEY , INTF.SOHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY , INTF.ICKEY , SH.DLVYEXPCTDAY , SH.ORDERISTDAY , INTF.ICKEY , IC.ICUNITKEY , IC.UOM , SH.COHDKEY , INTF.SODTKEY , IC.ICGRPKEY , IC.ICGRPTYPE
mapper.select: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectOrderAsnSendInfo */ SELECT SD.OWKEY , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY , SD.ICKEY , SH.CTKEY , SH.ORGORDERKEY AS REQORDERNO , SH.SHMISTNO , WP.CNFRMDATE , SH.EXTORDERTYPECD , SD.COHDKEY , SD.CODTKEY , 'N' AS NISYN , NULL AS NISCNLRNGDIV , OT.PERFMANSTYPE , COALESCE(OM.ERPPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS ERPPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(OM.MALPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS MALPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(SD.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS ORDEXPCTQTY , COALESCE(WP.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS EXPCTQTY , COALESCE(WP.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SD.EXPCTQTY, 0)=COALESCE(WP.EXPCTQTY, 0) THEN #{soCompleteStatus} ELSE SD.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON SD.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND SD.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON SH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND SH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND SH.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON SH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND SH.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SOHDKEY, SODTKEY , MAX(CNFRMDATE) AS CNFRMDATE , SUM(COALESCE(EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS EXPCTQTY , SUM(COALESCE(CNFRMQTY, 0)) AS CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} GROUP BY SOHDKEY, SODTKEY ) WP ON SD.SOHDKEY = WP.SOHDKEY AND SD.SODTKEY = WP.SODTKEY WHERE SH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SH.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectOrderAsnSendList */ SELECT SO.OWKEY , SO.SOHDKEY , SO.SODTKEY , SO.ICKEY , WP.OLNICKEY , SO.CTKEY , SO.ORGORDERKEY AS REQORDERNO , SO.CLAIMNO , SO.SHMISTNO , WP.CNFRMDATE , SO.EXTORDERTYPECD , SO.COHDKEY , SO.CODTKEY , CASE WHEN WP.NISYN = 'Y' THEN WP.NISYN WHEN COALESCE(SO.NISQTY, 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NISYN , CASE WHEN WP.NISCNLRNGDIV IS NOT NULL THEN WP.NISCNLRNGDIV WHEN COALESCE(SO.NISQTY, 0) > 0 THEN '03' ELSE '' END AS NISCNLRNGDIV , OT.PERFMANSTYPE , COALESCE(OM.ERPPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS ERPPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(OM.MALPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS MALPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(SO.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS ORDEXPCTQTY , COALESCE(SO.INITQTY, 0) AS INITQTY -- INITQTY EXPCTQTY 역할 변경 , COALESCE(WP.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS EXPCTQTY , COALESCE(WP.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SO.CHKEXPCTQTY, 0)=COALESCE(WP.CHKEXPCTQTY, 0) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SENDYN , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SO.EXPCTQTY, 0)=COALESCE(WP.EXPCTQTY, 0) THEN '20' ELSE SO.WKSTATUS END AS WKSTATUS FROM ( SELECT T.SOHDKEY , T.SODTKEY , MAX(T.ICKEY) AS OLNICKEY , MAX(T.CNFRMDATE) AS CNFRMDATE , MAX(T.NISYN) AS NISYN , MAX(T.NISCNLRNGDIV) AS NISCNLRNGDIV , SUM(T.EXPCTQTY) AS EXPCTQTY , MAX(T.EXPCTQTY_SUM) AS CHKEXPCTQTY , SUM(T.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY FROM ( SELECT WP1.SOHDKEY , WP1.SODTKEY , WP1.ICKEY , WP1.CNFRMDATE , WP1.NISYN , WP1.NISCNLRNGDIV , WP1.EXPCTQTY , SUM(WP1.EXPCTQTY) OVER(PARTITION BY WP1.OWKEY, WP1.SOHDKEY) AS EXPCTQTY_SUM , WP1.CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP1 WHERE WP1.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP2 WHERE WP2.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WP2.IFID = #{ifid} AND WP1.SOHDKEY = WP2.SOHDKEY AND WP1.OWKEY = WP2.OWKEY ) ) T GROUP BY T.SOHDKEY, T.SODTKEY ) WP JOIN ( SELECT A.* , B.ICKEY , B.CODTKEY , B.SODTKEY , B.EXPCTQTY , B.INITQTY , B.NISQTY , SUM( B.EXPCTQTY ) OVER(PARTITION BY B.OWKEY, B.SOHDKEY) AS CHKEXPCTQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.SOHDKEY = B.SOHDKEY WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IFID = #{ifid} AND A.SOHDKEY = SOHDKEY AND A.OWKEY = OWKEY ) ) SO ON SO.SOHDKEY = WP.SOHDKEY AND SO.SODTKEY = WP.SODTKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON SO.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND SO.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND SO.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON SO.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND SO.ORDERTYPECD = OT.ORDERTYPECD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' WHERE SO.OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectWmsPerformanceErrList */ SELECT SOHDKEY , SODTKEY , MIN(CHK) AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.SOHDKEY, X.SODTKEY, CASE WHEN X.EXPCTQTY < COALESCE(SUM(Y.EXPCTQTY) OVER(PARTITION BY Y.OWKEY, Y.SOHDKEY, Y.SODTKEY), 0) + COALESCE(Z.EXPCTQTY, 0) THEN -1 WHEN X.WKSTATUS <> '10' THEN - 2::INTEGER ELSE 0 END CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT X LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE Y ON X.OWKEY = Y.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Y.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Y.SODTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY , EXPCTQTY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IFID = #{ifid} -- 인터페이스 아이디 ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY WHERE X.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP WHERE WP.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WP.IFID = #{ifid} AND WP.SOHDKEY = X.SOHDKEY AND WP.SODTKEY = X.SODTKEY ) ) T GROUP BY SOHDKEY, SODTKEY

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectRtnPerformanceInfo */ SELECT WP.OWKEY , WP.SOHDKEY , WP.SODTKEY , SH.COHDKEY , SD.COHDKEY , WP.WORKSEQ , WP.ICKEY , WP.EXPCTQTY , WP.CNFRMQTY , WP.AVQTY , WP.NAVQTY , WP.NORMALQTY , WP.DMGQTY , WP.DFCQTY , WP.DONAQTY , WP.FOODDMGQTY , WP.MISOBQTY , WP.CNFRMDATE , WP.WBLNO , WP.IFID , SH.EXTORDERTYPECD , COALESCE(OM.ERPPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS ERPPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(OM.MALPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS MALPERFMANSYN FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON WP.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON WP.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND WP.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON SH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND SH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND SH.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1 AND IFID = #{ifid}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInOutCloseSendInfo */ SELECT SH.COHDKEY , WP.SOHDKEY , WP.SODTKEY , WP.WORKSEQ , WP.CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON WP.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND WP.IFID = #{ifid} AND WP.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND WP.SODTKEY = #{sodtkey} AND COALESCE(WP.CLOSEYN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(WP.ERPSENDYN, 'N') = 'N'

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInReturnCloseSendInfo */ SELECT SH.COHDKEY , WP.WORKSEQ , WP.CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE IWP ON WP.OWKEY = IWP.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = IWP.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON WP.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND IWP.IFID = #{ifid} AND IWP.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectOutCloseSendInfo */ SELECT SH.COHDKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , WP.WORKSEQ , WP.CNFRMQTY , WP.NISYN , WP.NISCNLRNGDIV , SH.EXTORDERTYPECD , COALESCE(OM.ERPPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS ERPPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(OM.MALPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS MALPERFMANSYN FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON WP.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON SH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND SH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND SH.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1 AND WP.IFID = #{ifid}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectOutCloseMallSendList */ SELECT INTF.IFID , SH.ORGORDERKEY , SH.CLAIMNO , SD.ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , INTF.CNFRMQTY , INTF.EXPCTQTY , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD , CASE WHEN INTF.NISCNLRNGDIV IN ('03', '07') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NISYN , INTF.NISCNLRNGDIV , INTF.WBLNO , INTF.CNTRCD , INTF.MVOBGRPNO , INTF.WKTYPECD , COALESCE(OM.ERPPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS ERPPERFMANSYN , COALESCE(OM.MALPERFMANSYN, 'N') AS MALPERFMANSYN FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON INTF.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND INTF.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON SH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND SH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTORDERTYPECD AND SH.ORDERTYPECD = OM.ORDERTYPECD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid}
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertInfoSoWblPerformance */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO ( OWKEY , SOHDKEY , COHDKEY , DLVRYCORP , WBLNO , ICKEY , DLVRYQTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT INTF.OWKEY , INTF.SOHDKEY , SH.COHDKEY , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD , INTF.WBLNO , INTF.ICKEY , INTF.CNFRMQTY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON INTF.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND INTF.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND COALESCE(INTF.NISYN, 'N') != 'Y'

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfErpTablePerformance */ INSERT INTO TORDER_EAI_DLVPERFORMANCE_BATCH ( SND_NO , SND_ROW , SND_TOT_ROW , SND_DATE , SND_DT , SND_TRSN_TYP , SND_PROC_TYP , WRKCTKEY , OBCNFRMDAY , ICKEY , OBCNFRMQTY , OBTDLVYTYPE , ISTDAY , OBHOPEDAY , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY ) SELECT #{ifid} AS SND_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS SND_ROW, COUNT(*) OVER() AS SND_TOT_ROW, #{sysdate} AS SND_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SND_DT, 'I' AS SND_TRSN_TYP, 'N' AS SND_PROC_TYP, CH.CTKEY AS WRKCTKEY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AS OBCNFRMDAY, SD.ICKEY AS ICKEY, WP.CNFRMQTY AS OBCNFRMQTY, CH.DLVYMETHDCD AS OBTDLVYTYPE, SD.ORDERISTDAY AS ISTDAY, CH.DLVYEXPCTDAY AS OBHOPEDAY, SD.SOHDKEY, SD.SODTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD INNER JOIN (SELECT SOHDKEY, SODTKEY , MAX(CNFRMDATE) AS CNFRMDATE , MAX(NISYN) AS NISYN , MAX(NISCNLRNGDIV) AS NISCNLRNGDIV , SUM(COALESCE(EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS EXPCTQTY , SUM(COALESCE(CNFRMQTY, 0)) AS CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY SOHDKEY, SODTKEY ) WP ON SD.SODTKEY = WP.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON CH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CH.COHDKEY = SD.COHDKEY WHERE SD.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND WP.CNFRMQTY > 0 AND SD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_DLVPERFORMANCE_BATCH WHERE SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY )

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfErpTableMoveStorePerformance */ INSERT INTO TORDER_EAI_MOVESTOREPERFORMANCE_BATCH ( SND_NO , SND_ROW , SND_TOT_ROW , SND_DATE , SND_DT , SND_TRSN_TYP , SND_PROC_TYP , OBNO , OBCNFRMDAY , FROMCTKEY , ACKEY , ICKEY , ISTUNIT , FROMCTQTY , DLVYBOXNO , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY ) SELECT #{ifid} AS SND_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS SND_ROW , COUNT(*) OVER() AS SND_TOT_ROW , #{sysdate} AS SND_DATE , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SND_DT , 'I' AS SND_TRSN_TYP , 'N' AS SND_PROC_TYP , WP.SOHDKEY AS OBNO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AS OBCNFRMDAY , WP.CTKEY AS FROMCTKEY , SH.ACKEY AS ACKEY , SD.ICKEY AS ICKEY , SD.UOM AS ISTUNIT , WP.CNFRMQTY AS FROMCTQTY , '' AS DLVYBOXNO , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD INNER JOIN ( SELECT INFO.SOHDKEY, INFO.SODTKEY , MAX(INFO.CNFRMDATE) AS CNFRMDATE , MAX(INFO.NISYN) AS NISYN , MAX(INFO.NISCNLRNGDIV) AS NISCNLRNGDIV , SUM(COALESCE(INFO.EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS EXPCTQTY , SUM(COALESCE(INFO.CNFRMQTY, 0)) AS CNFRMQTY , MAX(INTF.CNTRCD) AS CNTRCD , MAX(INFO.CTKEY) AS CTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE INFO INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF ON INFO.IFID = INTF.IFID AND INFO.SOHDKEY = INTF.SOHDKEY AND INFO.SODTKEY = INTF.SODTKEY WHERE INFO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND INFO.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND INFO.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY INFO.SOHDKEY, INFO.SODTKEY ) WP ON SD.SODTKEY = WP.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON SH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND SH.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY WHERE SD.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND WP.CNFRMQTY > 0 AND SD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_MOVESTOREPERFORMANCE_BATCH WHERE SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY )

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfErpTableMoveObPerformance */ INSERT INTO TORDER_EAI_MOVEOBPERFORMANCE_BATCH ( SND_NO , SND_ROW , SND_TOT_ROW , SND_DATE , SND_DT , SND_TRSN_TYP , SND_PROC_TYP , OBNO , OBCNFRMDAY , FROMCTKEY , TOCTKEY , ICKEY , FROMCTQTY , CNTRNO , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY ) SELECT #{ifid} AS SND_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS SND_ROW , COUNT(*) OVER() AS SND_TOT_ROW , #{sysdate} AS SND_DATE , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SND_DT , 'I' AS SND_TRSN_TYP , 'N' AS SND_PROC_TYP , WP.SOHDKEY AS OBNO , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AS OBCNFRMDAY , WP.CTKEY AS FROMCTKEY , SH.FROMTOCTKEY AS TOCTKEY , SD.ICKEY AS ICKEY , WP.CNFRMQTY AS FROMCTQTY , WP.CNTRCD AS CNTRNO , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD INNER JOIN ( SELECT INFO.SOHDKEY, INFO.SODTKEY , MAX(INFO.CNFRMDATE) AS CNFRMDATE , MAX(INFO.NISYN) AS NISYN , MAX(INFO.NISCNLRNGDIV) AS NISCNLRNGDIV , SUM(COALESCE(INFO.EXPCTQTY, 0)) AS EXPCTQTY , SUM(COALESCE(INFO.CNFRMQTY, 0)) AS CNFRMQTY , MAX(INTF.CNTRCD) AS CNTRCD , MAX(INFO.CTKEY) AS CTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE INFO INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF ON INFO.IFID = INTF.IFID AND INFO.SOHDKEY = INTF.SOHDKEY AND INFO.SODTKEY = INTF.SODTKEY WHERE INFO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND INFO.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND INFO.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY INFO.SOHDKEY, INFO.SODTKEY ) WP ON SD.SODTKEY = WP.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON SH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND SH.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY WHERE SD.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND WP.CNFRMQTY > 0 AND SD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_MOVEOBPERFORMANCE_BATCH WHERE SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY )

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfErpTableInReturnClose */ INSERT INTO TORDER_EAI_DLVRTNPERFORMANCE_BATCH ( SND_NO , SND_ROW , SND_TOT_ROW , SND_DATE , SND_DT , SND_TRSN_TYP , SND_PROC_TYP , WRKCTKEY , RIIBCNFRMDAY , ICKEY , RIIBDDLNQTY , AVQTY , NAVQTY , SOHDKEY , SODTKEY ) SELECT #{ifid} AS SND_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS SND_ROW , COUNT(*) OVER() AS SND_TOT_ROW , #{sysdate} AS SND_DATE , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SND_DT , 'I' AS SND_TRSN_TYP , 'N' AS SND_PROC_TYP , WP.CTKEY AS WRKCTKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AS RIIBCNFRMDAY , SD.ICKEY AS ICKEY , WP.CNFRMQTY AS RIIBDDLNQTY , WP.AVQTY AS AVQTY , WP.NAVQTY AS NAVQTY , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON WP.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND WP.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND WP.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND WP.IFID = #{ifid} AND SD.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND WP.CNFRMQTY > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_DLVRTNPERFORMANCE_BATCH WHERE SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY ) GROUP BY WP.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , WP.CNFRMQTY , WP.AVQTY , WP.NAVQTY , SD.SOHDKEY , SD.SODTKEY
mapper.select:
/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInReturnCloseMallSendList */ SELECT INTF.IFID , SH.ORGORDERKEY , SH.CLAIMNO , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD AS DLVRYCORPCD , INTF.WBLNO , SD.ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , INTF.CNFRMQTY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON INTF.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND INTF.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY
WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND INTF.SODTKEY = #{sodtkey}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInReturnHoldMallSendList */ SELECT INTF.IFID , INTF.OWKEY , INTF.ORGORDERKEY , INTF.CLAIMNO , INTF.WBLNO , CASE WHEN SD.ICKEY IS NOT NULL THEN SD.ICKEY WHEN SD.ICKEY IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_IC WHERE ICKEY = INTF.ICKEY AND ASRTYN = 'Y' ) THEN INTF.ICKEY WHEN SD.ICKEY IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_IC WHERE ICKEY = INTF.ICKEY AND ASRTYN = 'Y' ) THEN COALESCE ( ( SELECT ASRTREPKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT WHERE ASRTKEY = INTF.ICKEY ), INTF.ICKEY ) ELSE INTF.ICKEY END AS ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , INTF.RIABLEQTY , INTF.RIIMPSQTY , INTF.HOLDRSNCD , INTF.HOLDDTRSNCD , INTF.HOLDPRCSDTCONT , INTF.IMGSEQ AS SENDIMGSEQ , INTF.IMGURL , SH.COHDKEY , SD.CODTKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_RTNHOLD INTF LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON INTF.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND INTF.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND INTF.ICKEY = SD.OLNICKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectStockChangeMallSendList */ SELECT INTF.IFID , ( SELECT COALESCE(ASRT.ASRTREPKEY, IC.ICKEY) AS ICKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC IC LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ASRT1.OWKEY , ASRT1.ASRTKEY , ASRT1.ASRTREPKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT ASRT1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , ASRTREPKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND QTY > 0 GROUP BY OWKEY , ASRTREPKEY HAVING COUNT(1) > 1 ) ASRT2 ON ASRT1.OWKEY = ASRT2.OWKEY AND ASRT1.ASRTREPKEY = ASRT2.ASRTREPKEY WHERE ASRT1.OWKEY = 'DAISO' ) ASRT ON IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTKEY WHERE IC.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND IC.ICKEY = INTF.ICKEY ) AS ICKEY , INTF.ICKEY AS OLNICKEY , INTF.SNDTGTDIV , INTF.IVMEDITRSNCD , INTF.MEDITQTY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_STOCKCHG INTF WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.SNDTGTDIV IN ('ALL', 'MAL')
mapper.insert: /* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml insertIntfErpTableStockChange */ INSERT INTO TORDER_EAI_IVCHGRSLT_BATCH ( SND_NO , SND_ROW , SND_TOT_ROW , SND_DATE , SND_DT , SND_TRSN_TYP , SND_PROC_TYP , FROMCTKEY , IVCNFRMDAY , ICKEY , MEDITRSNTYPE , MEDITQTY , IBCLAIMRSNCONT , RSNCONT , DTRSNCONT , URKEY ) SELECT #{ifid} AS SND_NO , ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS SND_ROW , COUNT(*) OVER() AS SND_TOT_ROW , #{sysdate} AS SND_DATE , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS SND_DT , 'I' AS SND_TRSN_TYP , 'N' AS SND_PROC_TYP , INTF.CTKEY AS FROMCTKEY , INTF.REQUESTDT AS IVCNFRMDAY , INTF.ICKEY AS ICKEY , INTF.IVMEDITRSNCD AS MEDITRSNTYPE , INTF.MEDITQTY::NUMERIC AS MEDITQTY , INTF.IBCLAIMRSNCONT AS IBCLAIMRSNCONT , INTF.RSNCONT AS RSNCONT , INTF.DTRSNCONT AS DTRSNCONT --, INTF.CMT AS CMT , INTF.WMSINSERTURKEY AS URKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_STOCKCHG INTF WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.SNDTGTDIV IN ('ALL', 'ERP') GROUP BY INTF.CTKEY , INTF.REQUESTDT , INTF.ICKEY , INTF.IVMEDITRSNCD , INTF.MEDITQTY , INTF.IBCLAIMRSNCONT , INTF.RSNCONT , INTF.DTRSNCONT --, INTF.CMT , INTF.WMSINSERTURKEY
mapper.select: SELECT SH.CTKEY , SH.OWKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQDATE , INTF.WBLNO , SH.COHDKEY , SH.SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_MAL_RTNCNL INTF ON SH.ORGORDERKEY = INTF.ORGORDERKEY AND SH.CLAIMNO = INTF.CLAIMNO WHERE 1 = 1 AND SH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND SH.ORGORDERKEY = #{orgorderkey} AND SH.CLAIMNO = #{claimno} AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectStockCloseMallSendList */ SELECT INTF.IFID , ( SELECT COALESCE(ASRT.ASRTREPKEY, IC.ICKEY) AS ICKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC IC LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ASRT1.OWKEY , ASRT1.ASRTKEY , ASRT1.ASRTREPKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT ASRT1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , ASRTREPKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND QTY > 0 GROUP BY OWKEY , ASRTREPKEY HAVING COUNT(1) > 1 ) ASRT2 ON ASRT1.OWKEY = ASRT2.OWKEY AND ASRT1.ASRTREPKEY = ASRT2.ASRTREPKEY WHERE ASRT1.OWKEY = 'DAISO' ) ASRT ON IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTKEY WHERE IC.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND IC.ICKEY = INTF.OLNICKEY ) AS ICKEY , INTF.OLNICKEY , INTF.AVQTY AS STCKQTY , INTF.OBEXPCTQTY AS DLVPARMQTY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_STOCK_CLOSE INTF WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid}

/* oms-ordercommon-sql-oracle.xml selectReturnWblWmsSendInfo */ SELECT '09' AS CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , INTF.IFID , INTF.ORGORDERKEY , INTF.CLAIMNO , INTF.WBLNO , INTF.CMT , INTF.RECALLER , INTF.RECALLERADDRHD , INTF.RECALLERADDRDT , INTF.RECALLERZIPCD , INTF.RECALLERTEL01 , INTF.RECALLERTEL02 , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD , INTF.REQUESTDT FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RTNWBL INTF WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{ifid} AND INTF.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND INTF.ORGORDERKEY = #{orgorderkey} AND INTF.CLAIMNO = #{claimno}
